content.content: American gospel singer who is known for his affiliation with the Hillsong Church based out of Sydney, Australia. He has written songs like "Alive" and "Wake." He started leading worship in his local church at the age of 17. He has amassed over 50,000 followers on Instagram. He posted a photo of his younger self with his sister to his Instagram account in April 2015. He has been a member of the Hillsong Church along with PastorBrian Houston.
